title: 2026 Labour and Employment Conference - British Columbia
content:
## 2026 Labour and Employment Conference - British Columbia
Join McCarthy Tétrault's Labour and Employment Group for our annual British Columbia conference. Our conference will cover current and emerging developments, trends and news in labour and employment law, and human resources practices.
Topics will include:
- The Year in an Hour: The Annual Legal Update
- What’s New in Workplace Accommodation
- You're Hired! Hiring Pitfalls and Best Practices
- The Do’s and Don’ts of Just Cause Dismissals
Note: The presentation will take place in our Vancouver office and via webinar and will be given in English only. Please select your preferred location when registering. Space is limited in-person and we encourage you to RSVP early to reserve your spot. All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be shared a few days before the event.
For questions about this event, please contact vancouverevents@mccarthy.ca .
This program qualifies for up to 2.75 hours of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario.
Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: This program contains up to 2.75 hours of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
- Law Society of Ontario – Substantive
- Law Society of British Columbia – Substantive
